collections.title: एंटिटी कलेक्शन
collections.description: Weaver\ORM\Collection\EntityCollection is a typed, immutable-by-default collection returned by repositories and query builders. Every method that would mutate the collection returns a new EntityCollection instance, so the original is never modified. This makes collections safe to pass around without defensive copying.

concerns.title: Concerns और Traits
concerns.description: Weaver ORM provides built-in concerns — PHP traits that add common behaviour (timestamps, soft deletes, UUID generation) to entities and their mappers. They follow the same explicit-mapping philosophy: each concern contributes both the entity-side PHP logic and the mapper-side column definitions.

configuration.title: Symfony कॉन्फ़िगरेशन
configuration.description: Weaver ORM को config/packages/weaver.yaml के माध्यम से कॉन्फ़िगर किया जाता है। यह पृष्ठ सभी उपलब्ध विकल्पों को कवर करता है।

doctrine-bridge.title: Doctrine से माइग्रेशन
doctrine-bridge.description: Weaver ORM ships a compatibility bridge that lets you migrate an existing Doctrine ORM codebase incrementally. The bridge exposes the familiar Doctrine EntityManager API as a thin, deprecated wrapper over the Weaver internals so that existing code continues to compile and run while you migrate file by file.

embeddable.title: Embeddable ऑब्जेक्ट्स
embeddable.description: एक embeddable (DDD terminology में value object भी कहलाता है) एक PHP क्लास है जिसकी properties parent एंटिटी की टेबल में कॉलम के रूप में स्टोर की जाती हैं — कोई join नहीं, कोई अलग टेबल नहीं। Weaver एक समर्पित AbstractEmbeddableMapper के माध्यम से कॉलम मैपिंग और prefix लॉजिक प्रबंधित करता है।

entity-mapping.title: एंटिटी मैपिंग
entity-mapping.description: Weaver ORM डोमेन ऑब्जेक्ट्स को persistence मेटाडेटा से अलग करता है, सभी मैपिंग जानकारी को एक समर्पित मैपर क्लास में रखकर। यह पृष्ठ मैपर कॉन्फ़िगरेशन के हर पहलू को कवर करता है।

inheritance.title: इनहेरिटेंस मैपिंग
inheritance.description: Weaver ORM supports three inheritance patterns. Choose based on how similar your subclass schemas are and how often you need to query across all types in a single SELECT.

intro.title: Weaver ORM क्या है?
intro.description: Weaver ORM एक PHP 8.4+ ऑब्जेक्ट-रिलेशनल मैपर (object-relational mapper) है जो Symfony अनुप्रयोगों के लिए एक मूल सिद्धांत पर बना है: आपके डोमेन ऑब्जेक्ट्स को डेटाबेस की कोई जानकारी नहीं होनी चाहिए। एंटिटी क्लास पर कोई एनोटेशन नहीं, कोई प्रॉक्सी जनरेशन नहीं, कोई रनटाइम रिफ्लेक्शन नहीं — बस सामान्य PHP ऑब्जेक्ट्स और स्पष्ट मैपर क्लासेज जो उन्हें SQL में अनुवादित करती हैं।

lifecycle.title: लाइफसाइकल हुक
lifecycle.description: Weaver ORM provides a set of PHP 8 attributes that let you attach callbacks directly to entity methods. These callbacks are invoked at specific points in the entity's persistence lifecycle — before or after insert, update, delete, and load operations.

mongodb.title: MongoDB सपोर्ट
mongodb.description: Weaver ORM includes first-class support for MongoDB through a document-oriented abstraction layer. The API mirrors the relational ORM closely, so switching between SQL and MongoDB entities requires minimal mental overhead.

pagination.title: पेजिनेशन
pagination.description: Weaver ORM provides three paginator types for different use cases: Page (standard offset pagination), SimplePage (lightweight, no total count), and CursorPage (cursor-based, ideal for infinite scroll and large datasets).

querying.title: क्वेरी बिल्डर
querying.description: EntityQueryBuilder is Weaver ORM's fluent query API. It wraps Doctrine DBAL with full entity awareness: results are automatically hydrated into entity objects, global scopes are applied, and soft-delete filters are managed transparently.

quick-start.title: त्वरित प्रारंभ
quick-start.description: यह गाइड एक पूर्ण कार्यशील उदाहरण के माध्यम से चलता है: एक User एंटिटी परिभाषित करना, उसका मैपर लिखना, और EntityWorkspace का उपयोग करके बुनियादी persistence ऑपरेशन करना।

relations.title: रिलेशन्स
relations.description: Weaver ORM एक RelationMap के माध्यम से एंटिटी के मैपर क्लास के अंदर सभी रिलेशन मेटाडेटा परिभाषित करता है। एंटिटी प्रॉपर्टीज़ पर कोई एट्रिब्यूट नहीं हैं और कोई रनटाइम रिफ्लेक्शन नहीं है। रिलेशन्स हमेशा स्पष्ट रूप से लोड किए जाते हैं — Weaver आपकी पीठ के पीछे कभी surprise क्वेरीज़ नहीं जारी करता।

repositories.title: रिपॉज़िटरी
repositories.description: Repositories are the primary way to read entities from the database. Every entity has a corresponding repository that encapsulates all query logic for that entity, keeping controllers and services free of raw SQL or query-builder calls.

schema-migrations.title: स्कीमा और माइग्रेशन
schema-migrations.description: Weaver ORM generates SQL DDL directly from your mapper classes. The SchemaGenerator reads every registered mapper, converts it into a Doctrine DBAL Schema object, and can create, update, or drop your database schema through a set of Symfony console commands.

testing.title: टेस्टिंग
testing.description: Weaver ORM provides a dedicated testing toolkit that makes it straightforward to write fast, reliable tests for code that interacts with the database.

transactions.title: ट्रांजैक्शन
transactions.description: Weaver ORM provides TransactionManager, a dedicated service for managing database transactions. It supports simple atomic blocks, manual begin/commit/rollback, nested transactions via savepoints, and optimistic locking.

valkarnsql/approximate.title: अनुमानित क्वेरी
valkarnsql/approximate.description: Approximate Query Processing (AQP) lets ValkarnSQL answer aggregate questions — COUNT, SUM, AVG — by scanning a statistical sample of the data instead of reading every row. The result is returned in milliseconds even on tables with billions of rows, at the cost of a small, bounded error margin.

valkarnsql/branches.title: ब्रांचिंग
valkarnsql/branches.description: ValkarnSQL branching works like Git branches, but for data. A branch is a lightweight, copy-on-write snapshot of the entire database. It can be queried and mutated independently of its parent, then either merged back or discarded — without affecting any other branch.

valkarnsql/cdc.title: चेंज डेटा कैप्चर
valkarnsql/cdc.description: Change Data Capture (CDC) is a technique for observing every INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE that occurs on a database table, in real time, without polling. ValkarnSQL exposes a streaming SUBSCRIBE TO CHANGES ON  SQL command that yields rows as DML operations are committed to the WAL (Write-Ahead Log). Weaver ORM wraps this mechanism in CdcSubscriber and hydrates each row into a typed CdcEvent.

valkarnsql/overview.title: ValkarnSQL अवलोकन
valkarnsql/overview.description: ValkarnSQL is a custom database engine written in Rust. It speaks the PostgreSQL wire protocol version 3 natively, which means every PostgreSQL-compatible library, driver, and tool connects to it without modification — including the PDO pgsql driver that Doctrine DBAL uses under the hood.

valkarnsql/time-travel.title: टाइम ट्रैवल क्वेरी
valkarnsql/time-travel.description: ValkarnSQL maintains a complete history of every row that has ever existed in the database. Time travel queries let you read data as it appeared at any previous point in time by appending an AS OF clause to the FROM clause of a SELECT statement. This is useful for audit log replay, point-in-time recovery, compliance reports, and debugging data mutations.

valkarnsql/vectors.title: वेक्टर सर्च
valkarnsql/vectors.description: Vector similarity search lets you find rows whose stored embedding vectors are closest to a query vector. This is the foundation of semantic search, recommendation systems, and AI-powered retrieval — where "closeness" is measured by cosine distance, Euclidean (L2) distance, or dot product, rather than exact string or numeric equality.

valkarnsql/wasm-udfs.title: WASM UDFs
valkarnsql/wasm-udfs.description: ValkarnSQL supports WebAssembly User-Defined Functions (WASM UDFs) — custom SQL functions compiled to the WebAssembly binary format and executed inside the database engine. WASM UDFs run in a sandboxed, deterministic environment with near-native performance and no external network access. Once registered, they are callable from any SQL statement.

workspace.title: EntityWorkspace
workspace.description: EntityWorkspace is Weaver ORM's central unit-of-work service. It tracks entities across a single request, batches all writes, and flushes them to the database in a single coordinated operation. Think of it as the improved successor to Doctrine's EntityManager, redesigned for clarity, worker safety, and explicit intent.
